rationale: The "filling a container with small particles" satisfaction hook maps reasonably well onto Marble Sort's core loop of marbles cascading into colored boxes — both deliver ASMR-style fill/sort gratification for the same 25-55 female casual audience. Frictions: the archetype's pink/white/black kitchen palette and realistic spice-jar context clash with the game's lavender pastel + cartoon 3D aesthetic, and the single-color single-jar hook undersells the multi-color sorting puzzle that drives retention. Recommend adapting the satisfaction-pour formula but swapping the spice jar for multiple colored marble boxes filling simultaneously, in-engine, with the game's lavender palette and orange accent title card.
